name: Crunchy Curried Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken, rice, oranges, onion, and celery in a large bowl. Cover and refrigerate until chilled.
2. In a small bowl, combine yogurt, honey, lemon juice, curry powder, and salt. Stir until well combined. Cover and refrigerate until chilled.
3. To serve, pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently until well combined. Sprinkle with peanuts.
